analysis: The project appears to be a website focused on black holes, with existing HTML, CSS, and JavaScript files. The current theme seems to be cosmic and dark, but it needs enhancements to fully capture the black hole theme with animations and interactive elements. The CSS file should include more detailed animations and patterns, the HTML should have a mobile-friendly navigation menu, and the JavaScript should handle interactive elements and animations.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with a full cosmic theme, including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements to enhance the visual appeal.
Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices, ensuring all sections are properly included.
Fix syntax errors in the showSlide function and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented, including interactive elements and animations.
